info.title: Billsby API
info.description: Billsby is a subscription billing service for managing customers, subscriptions, invoices, products, plans, add-ons, allowances, and custom fields.

get.description: Retrieves all customers from the system.

post.description: Adds a customer without an active subscription.

get.description: Fetches specific customer information.
Lists all subscriptions for a particular customer.
Retrieves feature tags assigned to a customer.
Accesses transaction history for a customer.
Initiates payment method update process for a customer.

post.description: Processes a single, non-recurring payment for a customer.

put.description: Removes personal information per GDPR regulations.

get.description: Shows all active subscriptions.

post.description: Onboards a customer with an active subscription plan.

get.description: Retrieves individual subscription data.
Gets delivery location information for a subscription.

put.description: Modifies delivery location for a subscription.

get.description: Lists features enabled for a subscription.

post.description: Enables additional features for a subscription.

delete.description: Removes feature access from a subscription.

get.summary: Get Feature Tags by Plan and Custom Tags
get.description: Shows plan-based and custom feature tags for a subscription.
Accesses subscription activity history.

post.description: Attaches a new plan to an existing customer.

put.description: Switches subscription to a different tier.
Adjusts billing cycle timing for a subscription.

get.description: Retrieves specific invoice details.
Accesses all invoices issued by the company.
Shows invoices for a particular customer.

post.description: Processes a refund for an issued invoice.

put.description: Retries failed payment collection for an invoice.
Records manual payment received for an invoice.

get.description: Lists all credit memos issued by the company.
Shows credits for a specific customer.
Shows all available products.
Fetches specific product information.
Displays all subscription tiers for a product.

post.description: Sets up a billing period configuration for a plan.

get.description: Retrieves usage tracking data for a subscription.

post.description: Modifies usage metrics for a subscription.

get.description: Shows optional features available.
Fetches specific add-on information.
Lists usage limits available.
Retrieves specific allowance data.
Shows add-ons for a specific subscription.
Lists limits for a specific subscription.
Retrieves all custom field definitions.

post.description: Adds a new custom field definition.

get.description: Gets customer responses to custom fields.

apiKey.name: apikey
apiKey.description: API key from Settings > Configuration > API keys and webhooks
